title: BASIC NEEDS - 211info
text: ST TIMOTHY'S EPISCOPAL CHURCH BASIC NEEDS Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides public showers, laundry vouchers, and temporary mailing addresses. 401 Fir Street Brookings, OR 97415 Eligibility: Low income households, and anyone who needs spiritual support Hours: Monday/Wednesday/Friday 9am-noon Email (541) 469-3314 Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers Main phone (541) 469-3314 Email Address: [email protected] INTAKE PROCEDURE: Walk in FEES: None DOCUMENTS: None LANGUAGES: English, Spanish AREA SERVED: Cities of Brookings and Harbor Services: Laundry Vouchers Public Showers/Baths Temporary Mailing Address Other Services Offered At This Location: FOOD - COMMUNITY KITCHEN ADVOCACY If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service.
